channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Demi Lovato Struts Into Her Dance Era With ‘Low Rise Jeans’: Stream It Now
item.description:
[Energetic music plays]
Host: "Welcome back to the show. We've got the latest scoop on Demi Lovato's brand new single, 'Low Rise Jeans'. This fresh cut is part of her dance era and it's already making waves. Released at midnight, 'Low Rise Jeans' is a pop anthem with a retro twist and a hip-hop sensibility. Produced and co-written with Zhone, this track is perfect for commercial radio airplay."
[Short music clip of "Low Rise Jeans"]
Host: "Demi Lovato road-tested 'Low Rise Jeans' at the opening night of her It's Not That Deep Tour in Orlando, Florida, and the crowd loved it. The tour is in support of her 2025 album of the same name, which debuted at number 9 on the Billboard 200 chart. And if you're excited about the tour, you're not alone - Lovato's also brought out special guests like Selena Gomez and Joe Jonas to join her on stage."
[Short music clip of "Low Rise Jeans"]
Host: "But that's not all - 'Low Rise Jeans' will be featured on the deluxe version of her album, It's Not That Deep (Unless You Want It To Be), out on April 24th. This album has already made history for Lovato, earning her first number 1 spot on Billboard's Top Dance Albums chart. And if you're a fan of Demi Lovato, you know she's been busy - she's also starring in the drama film Tow and executive producing Camp Rock 3, set to debut on Disney+ this summer."
[Short music clip of "Low Rise Jeans"]
Host: "The It's Not That Deep Tour is coming to a city near you, with the next stop in Philadelphia on April 18th. And don't forget to stream 'Low Rise Jeans' now. We can't wait to see what's next for Demi Lovato. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
[Music fades out]
